creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Mon Mar 24 15:40:57 2014
New Revision: 349018
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/349018
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r349018/

Log:
  Rufus-scheduler (out of the box) is an in-process, in-memory scheduler.
  It supports five kinds of jobs: in, at, every, interval and cron jobs.
  
  WWW: https://github.com/jmettraux/rufus-scheduler
  
  PR:		ports/187812
  Submitted by:	ports@robakdesign.com

Added:
  head/devel/rubygem-rufus-scheduler/
  head/devel/rubygem-rufus-scheduler/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-rufus-scheduler/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-rufus-scheduler/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/devel/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/Makefile	Mon Mar 24 15:38:52 2014	(r349017)
+++ head/devel/Makefile	Mon Mar 24 15:40:57 2014	(r349018)
@@ -4350,6 +4350,7 @@
     SUBDIR += rubygem-rubygame
     SUBDIR += rubygem-rubyinlineaccel
     SUBDIR += rubygem-rubytree
+    SUBDIR += rubygem-rufus-scheduler
     SUBDIR += rubygem-runt
     SUBDIR += rubygem-ruport
     SUBDIR += rubygem-safe_yaml

Added: head/devel/rubygem-rufus-scheduler/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-rufus-scheduler/Makefile	Mon Mar 24 15:40:57 2014	(r349018)
@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	rufus-scheduler
+PORTVERSION=	3.0.7
+CATEGORIES=	devel rubygems
+MASTER_SITES=	RG
+
+MAINTAINER=	ports@robakdesign.com
+COMMENT=	Ruby job scheduler for at, cron and others
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-tzinfo>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-tzinfo
+
+USE_RUBY=	yes
+USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
+RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/devel/rubygem-rufus-scheduler/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-rufus-scheduler/distinfo	Mon Mar 24 15:40:57 2014	(r349018)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (rubygem/rufus-scheduler-3.0.7.gem) = ab6dd54d21b36035a397c33c197c384b9ce8f5f8dfeafada806657d336b61e94
+SIZE (rubygem/rufus-scheduler-3.0.7.gem) = 52224

Added: head/devel/rubygem-rufus-scheduler/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-rufus-scheduler/pkg-descr	Mon Mar 24 15:40:57 2014	(r349018)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+Rufus-scheduler (out of the box) is an in-process, in-memory scheduler. 
+It supports five kinds of jobs: in, at, every, interval and cron jobs.
+
+WWW: https://github.com/jmettraux/rufus-scheduler
